name: Hardeman County Community Health Center
message: Hardeman County Community Health Center (HCCHC) is a Non-Profit Federal Qualified Health Center (FQHC) who provides comprehensive, integrated and quality health care services to improve the health and well-being of our patients and communities we serve. The mission of Hardeman County Community Health Center is to provide quality, accessible, affordable primary health care services to the residents of Hardeman County, Haywood County, Chester County, and neighboring counties.
